trace_target.label: token emitter pipeline — web CSS + Tailwind preset + TUI theme

requirements.title: pnpm --filter @keel/ui generate-tokens emits three outputs with provenance header; single source read (tokens.json + optional schema)
requirements.level_notes: Emit-command + output-path + provenance-header + single-read contract. Substrate evidence: iter-63 dev-story execution produced the three target files at the canonical paths with the prescribed provenance-header shape (CSS /* */, TS //, Python #) on first invocation; pnpm --filter @keel/ui generate-tokens exit 0 with one-line stdout summary. CR adversarial pass (iter-66) is the agreed backstop for provenance-shape exactness + path-literal exactness.
substrate_verification: Emitter command resolves: `pnpm --filter @keel/ui generate-tokens` → `tsx scripts/generate-tokens.ts` per `packages/ui/package.json` `scripts.generate-tokens` entry (iter-63 Task 1).

Three output paths emitted at canonical locations: `packages/ui/src/tokens.css` (NEW; 118 lines), `packages/ui/tailwind.preset.ts` (NEW; 119 lines), `packages/devbox/tui/theme.py` (NEW; 135 lines) + sibling zero-byte `packages/devbox/tui/__init__.py` — paths match § AC 1 + UX-DR3 + `ux-design-specification.md:362` exactly (emitter location variance with architecture.md:916-917 resolved via § AC 1 scope carve-out).

Provenance header shape matches § AC 1 scope carve-out verbatim at all three targets: `AUTOGENERATED from packages/ui/tokens.json — DO NOT EDIT` + `Source file commit SHA: <short-sha>` + `Emitter: packages/ui/scripts/generate-tokens.ts @ v1.0.0` + `Regenerate via: pnpm --filter @keel/ui generate-tokens`. Comment syntax adapted per-target (`/* */`, `//`, `#`).

Source-SHA resolver uses `git log -1 --format=%h --abbrev=12 -- <path>` (intent-matching form per iter-63 Debug Log — the story's literal `git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD -- <path>` returns repo HEAD which violates the same carve-out's `NOT HEAD of the repo` constraint; emitter implements the intent-correct form + documents deviation in source-file header). Resolves to `6b1790a02adb` at dev time (Story 1.11 commit — the file's latest commit SHA). Uncommitted-state fallback `uncommitted-<content-sha256-16>` is implemented + untested at Story 1.12 time (source file is committed).

Single source read verified: emitter uses `node:fs.readFileSync('packages/ui/tokens.json', 'utf-8')` — one and only one filesystem read of a source file. Optional schema validation (§ AC 6 carve-out) NOT implemented (default-skip per story). Three filesystem writes + one optional `mkdirSync` for the new `packages/devbox/tui/` directory + one optional zero-byte `__init__.py` write on first run (idempotent on re-run).
EMITTER_VERSION literal constant: `export const EMITTER_VERSION = '1.0.0';` in `packages/ui/scripts/generate-tokens.ts` (iter-63 Task 1).

Quality-gate bundle (iter-63): `pnpm -w typecheck` ✓ (16 tasks), `pnpm -w lint` ✓, `pnpm -w build` ✓ (16 tasks; scoped `@keel/keel-invariants` rebuild per iter-51 pattern), `pnpm -w format:check` ✓ (emitter source prettier-conformant; three generated outputs ignored via `.prettierignore`), `pnpm exec prek run --all-files` 3/3 hooks Pass.

Pre-documented variance (NOT a gap): emitter source-SHA resolver command deviation from story § AC 1 literal (`rev-parse` → `log -1 --format=%h`). Functional equivalence trivially verifiable; rev-parse form would return repo HEAD (self-contradicts the carve-out).

requirements.title: Determinism — byte-identical round-trip (same input → same output, no time/RNG/network)
requirements.level_notes: Determinism + FR67-adapted purity contract. SUBSTRATE_VERIFIED end-to-end via iter-63 Task 6 two determinism smokes: smoke 1 byte-identical round-trip (two back-to-back runs → matching sha256sum across all three outputs) + smoke 2 source-change propagation with revert-to-baseline (edit → outputs differ → revert → outputs match run-1 hashes byte-for-byte). Strongest substrate evidence of the six ACs.
substrate_verification: Determinism smoke 1 (byte-identical round-trip, primary substrate evidence): run 1 hashes CSS `4b59cb679c76a5cad3211061c49e1a450feb3d296b7c647607b2bd17a36d19f9` / Tailwind `c7bd57fa7b73f1f6b0288363152d2363e606c9504789b8e57c3d1069e123b130` / Python `7776b448a49d111ff266999627bdaea3283e481940df016d386984f19475a8c7`. Run 2 hashes: IDENTICAL byte-for-byte across all three targets. `git status --porcelain` on the three outputs post-run-2: only `??` (untracked), zero diffs-since-last-write. iter-63 Debug Log + Completion Notes.

Determinism smoke 2 (source-change propagation + revert-to-baseline, secondary substrate evidence): targeted edit `sed -i` on `packages/ui/tokens.json` bumps `color.accent.500.$value` from `oklch(54% 0.18 245)` → `oklch(55% 0.18 245)`. Post-edit `sha256sum` DIFFERS from run-1 across all three outputs. Value propagates verbatim to all three targets: CSS `--color-accent-500: oklch(55% 0.18 245);`, Tailwind `'accent-500': 'oklch(55% 0.18 245)'`, Python `accent_500 = 'oklch(55% 0.18 245)'`. Alias-downstream propagation CONFIRMED: `color.accent.default = {color.accent.500}` → `color.text.accent = {color.accent.default}` → `color.state.in-progress = {color.accent.default}` — all three downstream aliases pick up the bumped value (multi-hop DFS flattening proven end-to-end). Revert via `git checkout -- packages/ui/tokens.json`; re-run emitter; post-revert hashes MATCH run-1 baseline byte-for-byte. iter-63 Debug Log + Completion Notes.

Alias walker cycle-detection (defensive guard per § AC 3 carve-out): DFS + visited-set implementation verifies no cycles in Story 1.11 source during smoke runs (exit 0 on all five observed runs). Cycle-detection code path is substrate-verified by type-checking + code inspection; no cycle-input smoke run at Story 1.12 time (negative-space probe deferred to Story 1.13 schema-validation gate per § AC 2 carve-out).

FR67 purity contract (§ AC 6): emitter uses `node:fs` / `node:path` / `node:url` / `node:crypto` / `node:child_process` stdlib only; zero third-party runtime imports; zero network (`fetch` / `https.request` / DNS); zero time-adjacent values except source-SHA from git state; zero RNG; zero `process.env.KEEL_*` reads; one source read + three writes + one-time directory create. Verified by code inspection at iter-63 + quality gates green.

Epic 13 reproducibility forward-reference (§ AC 6): forward-contract only at Story 1.12; CI enforcement lands at Stories 13-1/13-2 (13 epics downstream). Current byte-identical round-trip smoke is the substrate-level analogue.

`pnpm keel-invariants:check` clean-path ✓ exit 0 on first sync-gate invocation post scoped `@keel/keel-invariants` build — no drift; `INV-tokens-emitter` manifest entry (sha256 `6ee7731efb65d1cecd9aa35a51d377cf6a25c3543dc8433f74a761cc71442796`) + `INVARIANTS.md` anchor + emitter source hash all aligned on first pass.

requirements.title: web CSS custom properties — full 8-group coverage under :root { } + [data-theme="dark"] { }; kebab full-path naming; alias-flatten at emit
requirements.level_notes: Web-CSS-vars contract: 8 token groups × base + dark overlay × kebab full-path var names × alias-flattened leaf literals. Substrate evidence: emitted `packages/ui/src/tokens.css` (118 lines; 90 base + 16 dark overrides) with canonical byte-format declared via `.prettierignore` (emitter-owned-byte-format decision per iter-63 lesson). CR adversarial pass (iter-66) is the agreed backstop for leaf-enumeration exhaustiveness + alias-flatten correctness.
substrate_verification: `:root { }` base block present: 90 emitted CSS custom properties covering all 8 token groups (color / type / font / space / radius / motion / density / breakpoint). Determinism smoke 2 confirmed var enumeration survives targeted source edits + reverts.

`[data-theme="dark"] { }` overlay block present: 16 dark-mode overrides matching `$modes.dark` entries from `packages/ui/tokens.json` — surface + text + border + accent.fg + status.bg variant re-remaps per Story 1.11 dark-overlay shape.

Kebab full-path CSS var naming per § AC 3 scope carve-out: `color.surface.raised` → `--color-surface-raised`; `color.status.success.fg` → `--color-status-success-fg`; `color.accent.500` → `--color-accent-500`; `motion.swift` → `--motion-swift`; `density.compact` → `--density-compact`; `breakpoint.2xl` → `--breakpoint-2xl`. Path split via `path.split('.').join('-')` + `--` prefix.

Alias flattening per § AC 3 scope carve-out: `{color.accent.500}` resolves at emit-time to leaf literal `oklch(54% 0.18 245)`; multi-hop chains (`{color.state.in-progress}` → `{color.accent.default}` → `{color.accent.500}` → `oklch(...)`) flatten through all hops. Every emitted CSS var carries RESOLVED leaf literal — zero `var()` chains per § AC 3 strategy pin. iter-63 Debug Log confirms 2-hop and 3-hop chain resolution verified via determinism smoke 2 value-propagation.

All 8 token groups covered (no omissions): `color.*` (neutral + accent + surface + text + border + status + severity + state) ✓ / `type.*` (8 stops) ✓ / `font.*` (sans + mono) ✓ / `space.*` (13 stops) ✓ / `radius.*` (5 stops) ✓ / `motion.*` (dial + 5 tiers) ✓ / `density.*` (dial + 3 tiers) ✓ / `breakpoint.*` (5 stops) ✓. iter-63 File List confirms 90-base-token emission.

Leaf-value formatting per § Task 2: OKLCH literals pass-through unchanged; dimension literals (`16px`) pass-through; duration literals (`200ms`) pass-through; number literals emitted as-is (`1`, `0.875`); fontFamily comma-separated strings pass-through. No unit-stripping, no value transformation, no hex conversion.

Output ordering: canonical source order preserved per V8 ES2015 `JSON.parse` iteration rules — integer-like keys first ascending, then string keys in insertion order. Determinism smoke 1 byte-identical round-trip proves ordering stability across runs.

Pre-documented variance (NOT a gap): emitter output canonical byte-format diverges from prettier's preferred form (OKLCH decimal normalization `0.20 → 0.2`; attribute-selector quote `"dark" → 'dark'`). Resolved via `.prettierignore` addition (emitter owns output byte-format; prettier owns emitter source). Lesson captured in iter-63 RALPH.md signpost for Story 1.13+ emit-target pairs.

requirements.title: Tailwind v4 preset — flat-kebab keys under theme.extend.{colors,fontSize,fontFamily,spacing,borderRadius,transitionDuration,motionScale,densityScale,screens}; base-only mode
requirements.level_notes: Tailwind preset contract: flat-kebab keys + Tailwind-native namespaces + base-only (dark consumed via consumer-side `dark:` modifier). Substrate evidence: emitted `packages/ui/tailwind.preset.ts` (119 lines) with `keelTailwindPreset` exporting 9 `theme.extend.*` namespaces. CR adversarial pass (iter-66) is the agreed backstop for type-shape compatibility + Tailwind v4 idiom correctness.
substrate_verification: Named export `keelTailwindPreset` present — single `export const keelTailwindPreset = { theme: { extend: { ... } } } as const;` per § Task 3 specification.

Flat-kebab key shape under `theme.extend.colors` per § AC 4 scope carve-out: `'surface-raised'` (group-stripped from `color.surface.raised`), `'status-success-fg'`, `'accent-500'`, `'state-in-progress'` etc. — NO nested objects. Group prefix `color.` stripped since keys live under `colors` already; divergence from CSS full-path naming per AC 3 is intentional (per carve-out).

9 `theme.extend.*` namespaces populated: `colors` (all color groups flat-stripped) / `fontSize` (type.* → tuples with lineHeight default) / `fontFamily` (font.sans + font.mono) / `spacing` (space.* px strings) / `borderRadius` (radius.* px strings + 'full' = `9999px`) / `transitionDuration` (motion tier durations in `ms` strings) / `motionScale` (custom — motion.scale dial unitless) / `densityScale` (custom — density tiers + dial) / `screens` (breakpoint.* px strings). Full namespace enumeration confirmed via iter-63 File List + emitted-file inspection.

Color values land as OKLCH literals (flattened per § AC 3), NOT as `var(--color-*)` references per § AC 4 scope carve-out. Rationale: Tailwind JIT consumes at consumer-build time; literals avoid dual-source-of-truth at source-output-sync gate time.

Type-shape compatibility (§ AC 4 scope carve-out): `as const` narrowing; no `import type { Config } from 'tailwindcss'` in the emitted file (Tailwind NOT a `@keel/ui` devDependency at Story 1.12 time per § Task 1 stance). Consumer apps at Epic 7 Story 7-1 time will import Tailwind types at their own build.

Base-only mode overlay (no dark-mode values in preset per § Task 3 mode-overlay rule): dark consumed via consumer-side `dark:` class modifier on utility classes + CSS-var cascade from `tokens.css` `[data-theme="dark"] { }` block. Tailwind preset carries only base-mode literal values.

Non-color group mapping verified per § Task 3: `type.xl2` → `fontSize.xl2` with `[value, { lineHeight: '1.5' }]` tuple shape (Python-identifier-safe name `xl2` preserved in Tailwind since Tailwind accepts arbitrary strings under `theme.extend.fontSize`); `density.*` under custom `densityScale` namespace (Tailwind has no native density vocabulary).

Output file lands at package root `packages/ui/tailwind.preset.ts` (sibling to `tokens.json` + `tokens.schema.json` — NOT under `src/`) per § Task 3 scope carve-out; Epic 7 Story 7-1 consumer import path `@keel/ui/tailwind.preset` resolves at the root.
`pnpm -w typecheck` ✓ — emitted TS preset passes strict TS under shared tsconfig; `as const` typing stable.

requirements.title: TUI theme.py — SimpleNamespace base + theme.dark overlay; snake_case slugs; Python-stdlib-only; breakpoint parity emitted for cross-runtime consistency
requirements.level_notes: Python TUI contract: SimpleNamespace-based constants + snake_case attribute naming (with digit-segment + hyphen-in-segment transforms) + Python-stdlib-only import surface + dark-mode nested overlay. Substrate evidence: emitted `packages/devbox/tui/theme.py` (135 lines) + sibling zero-byte `__init__.py`. iter-63 spot-check attribute-access verified by inline `python -c` invocation. CR adversarial pass (iter-66) is the agreed backstop for attribute enumeration exhaustiveness + Python-idiom correctness.
substrate_verification: Module-level `theme = SimpleNamespace(colors=SimpleNamespace(...), type=SimpleNamespace(...), font=..., space=..., radius=..., motion=..., density=..., breakpoint=..., dark=SimpleNamespace(colors=SimpleNamespace(...)))` — single root + 9 nested namespaces per § Task 4 + § AC 5 scope carve-out (preferred SimpleNamespace default).

Snake_case slugs per § Task 4: `color.surface.raised` → `surface_raised`; `color.status.success.fg` → `status_success_fg`; `color.accent.500` → `accent_500` (digit suffix valid); `color.state.in-progress` → `state_in_progress` (segment-local hyphen→underscore post-join transform — SM-2 iter-61 PATCH; Python identifier edge case).

Digit-segment handling per § Task 4: `type.2xl` → `type_xl2` (leading-digit segment swap — Python identifiers can't start with a digit; `2xl` → `xl2` preserves ordering while guaranteeing valid ident); `breakpoint.2xl` → `breakpoint_xl2` same rule. iter-63 Completion Notes confirms `theme.type.xl2 == '24px'` and `theme.breakpoint.xl2 == 1536` spot-check passed.
Leading-digit prefix handling per iter-63 Completion Notes: `space.0` → `_0` (underscore prefix for standalone digit segments); spot-check `theme.space._0 == '0px'` passed.

Python-stdlib-only imports per § AC 5 scope carve-out: `from types import SimpleNamespace` is the sole import in emitted `theme.py`. Zero `numpy` / `colour` / `pydantic` / `attrs` / `dataclasses` imports (SimpleNamespace chosen over dataclass shape). Verified by inline `python -c 'from theme import theme; ...'` spot-check at iter-63 time — imports resolve without `pip install`.

`theme.dark` nested overlay mirrors tokens.json `$modes.dark` sparse shape: only surface/text/border/accent.fg/status.bg variants present; `theme.dark.colors.surface_default` resolves to dark-mode neutral (`oklch(8% 0 0)` via alias-flatten per iter-63 spot-check).

8-group parity per § AC 5 scope carve-out + architecture.md:90 cross-runtime invariant: `theme.colors`, `type`, `font`, `space`, `radius`, `motion`, `density`, `breakpoint` all emitted. `breakpoint.*` emitted as `int` constants (px values without unit) for TUI-consumption future-proofing (Textual doesn't use breakpoints — dead-weight attribute kept for stable-ID invariance).

Value types preserved per § Task 4 shape rule: `$type: number` source entries emit as Python `int`/`float` literals (`theme.motion.scale == 1`, `theme.density.comfortable == 1.125`); `$type: duration`/`dimension`/`color`/`fontFamily` source entries emit as Python string literals (OKLCH pass-through, `px`/`ms` preserved).

Sibling zero-byte `packages/devbox/tui/__init__.py` emitted at first run (idempotent — not rewritten on re-run per iter-63 Debug Log); makes `from theme import theme` importable via Python-package semantics.

OKLCH → pass-through (not hex conversion) per § AC 5 scope carve-out default: Textual ≥ 0.80 supports `oklch(...)` natively; emitter emits OKLCH string literals unchanged. Re-litigation deferred to Story 3.33 TUI consumption time.

requirements.title: FR67-adapted purity contract — no network / no time / no RNG / no env / single source read / bounded writes; Epic 13 reproducibility forward-reference
requirements.level_notes: Purity + reproducibility contract. Substrate evidence: emitter source code inspection (iter-63) + determinism smoke 1+2 (AC 2) + quality-gate bundle (typecheck / lint / build / prek all green). Epic 13 CI check does not exist at Story 1.12 time — forward-reference only; byte-identical round-trip is the substrate-level analogue. CR adversarial pass (iter-66) is the agreed backstop for purity-contract compliance (Blind Hunter + Edge Case Hunter fan-out per § Testing Standards:246 spec-declared CR-substitution clause).
substrate_verification: Zero network: emitter imports `node:fs` / `node:path` / `node:url` / `node:crypto` / `node:child_process` only — zero `fetch`, zero `https.request`, zero DNS lookup, zero `http` module import. Verified by code inspection at iter-63.

Bounded filesystem reads: emitter reads exactly `packages/ui/tokens.json` (one `readFileSync`). Optional schema validation path (§ AC 6 carve-out default-skip) NOT implemented — schema file NOT read at Story 1.12 time.

Bounded filesystem writes: three target outputs (`packages/ui/src/tokens.css` + `packages/ui/tailwind.preset.ts` + `packages/devbox/tui/theme.py`) + one optional sibling `packages/devbox/tui/__init__.py` (idempotent — only written if absent) + `mkdirSync` for new `packages/devbox/tui/` directory. No temp files, no `.cache/` writes, no `git` mutations, no `npm` side effects.

Zero time-dependent values: emitter source contains zero `Date.now()` / `new Date()` / `process.hrtime()` references (iter-63 code inspection). Sole time-adjacent value is the provenance-header source SHA resolved via `git log -1 --format=%h --abbrev=12 -- <path>` — deterministic from committed git state (with `uncommitted-<content-sha256-16>` fallback for uncommitted-source states).

Zero RNG: emitter source contains zero `Math.random()` / `crypto.randomBytes()` / `crypto.randomInt()` calls. `crypto` import is used only for sha256 computation in the uncommitted-state fallback path — deterministic function of source content.
Zero `process.env.KEEL_*` reads: emitter source contains zero `process.env` references (iter-63 code inspection). No feature-flag, no config-override via env.
Determinism smoke 1 (AC 2) proves byte-identical round-trip → purity holds in practice. Two back-to-back runs with zero source changes → matching sha256sum across all three outputs.
Determinism smoke 2 (AC 2) proves same-input → same-output contract: edit source → outputs change → revert source → outputs match pre-edit hashes byte-for-byte.

Epic 13 forward-reference: § AC 6 scope carve-out declares Epic 13 CI check aspirational + non-blocking at Story 1.12 time. Stories 13-1 / 13-2 will add content-hash-diff step to `pre-merge-fast` that runs the emitter and diffs output against committed output; Story 1.12 emitter must survive that check on landing day (substrate evidence suggests it will — byte-identical round-trip already proven).

Pre-documented OPT-OUT (NOT a gap): gamut-mapping (§ AC 6 scope carve-out) NOT implemented at Story 1.12 time — browser clipping accepted on slightly-out-of-gamut OKLCH values; WCAG gate is Story 1.13 scope. Re-defer forecast to Story 1.13 at iter-66 CR.

Pre-documented OUT-OF-SCOPE (NOT a gap): shadow-machinery (§ AC 6 scope carve-out) NOT implemented — requires source mutation of Story-1.11-frozen tokens.json; carry-to a new Story-1.17-TBD follow-up.
`pnpm exec prek run --all-files` 3/3 hooks Pass — prettier-format + typecheck + lint all green post-emit; implicit evidence of idempotent (re-emit produces zero diff → zero pre-commit churn).

medium_gaps.recommendation: Defer provenance-header shape + emit-command + output-path assertions to Story 1.16 (test-runner landing). iter-63 substrate evidence (file-existence + header-shape spot check + one-line stdout summary) + CR adversarial pass per § Testing Standards are the agreed substrate evidence.

SUBSTRATE_VERIFIED end-to-end via iter-63 Task 6 two determinism smokes (byte-identical round-trip + source-change propagation with revert-to-baseline). Strongest substrate evidence of the six ACs. Defer runner-hosted unit coverage to Story 1.16 (would duplicate substrate smokes); defer negative-space cycle-input probe to Story 1.13 schema-validation gate per § AC 2 scope carve-out.

Defer CSS-var-enumeration snapshot tests + alias-flatten correctness probes to Story 1.16 (test-runner landing). CR adversarial pass is the agreed backstop. Story 1.13 source-output sync gate will re-exercise AC 3 integration at every pre-commit (re-runs emitter in --check mode + diffs vs checked-in `tokens.css`).

Defer Tailwind preset type-shape compatibility tests + flat-kebab key enumeration to Story 1.16. Consumer-side verification lands at Epic 7 Story 7-1 when `apps/web` imports `@keel/ui/tailwind.preset` and Tailwind JIT generates utility classes — any preset-shape violation breaks consumer build loudly. CR adversarial pass is the agreed backstop; Story 1.13 source-output sync gate re-exercises AC 4 at every pre-commit.

Defer Python theme.py import-resolvability tests + SimpleNamespace attribute enumeration to Story 1.16. Consumer-side verification lands at Epic 3 Story 3.33 when Ralph TUI imports `from packages.devbox.tui.theme import theme` — any missing attribute breaks TUI boot loudly. CR adversarial pass is the agreed backstop; iter-63 spot-checks via inline `python -c` invocation substrate-verify attribute-access paths.

Defer purity-sandbox test (deny network/time/RNG/env via runtime proxy) to Story 1.16. Substrate evidence: code inspection + AC 2 determinism smokes already prove same-input → same-output purity holds. Epic 13 CI check is the load-bearing forward-enforcement; Story 1.12 emitter must survive that check on Epic-13 landing day. CR adversarial pass (Blind Hunter + Edge Case Hunter) per § Testing Standards:246 spec-declared CR-substitution clause is the Story 1.12-time adversarial backstop for AC 2 determinism + AC 6 purity.

recommendations.action: Accept WAIVED posture — six P2 ACs cover a substrate+tooling emitter story with no live test runner. AC 2 determinism + AC 6 purity have strongest substrate evidence (Task 6 two determinism smokes end-to-end, covering byte-identical round-trip + source-change propagation + revert-to-baseline). AC 1/3/4/5 substrate-verified via iter-63 dev-story execution + quality-gate bundle + spot-check attribute access. Per-AC runner-hosted coverage deferred to Story 1.16 (test-runner landing); runtime enforcement of AC 3+4 consumer integration lands via Story 1.13 source-output sync gate on every pre-commit.

Story 1.13 pre-commit gates (schema-validation + WCAG-AA contrast + source-output sync) will re-exercise AC 3 (CSS vars) + AC 4 (Tailwind preset) + AC 5 (TUI theme.py) integration at every pre-commit once they land. Story 1.12 emitter is the positive-space consumer of Story 1.11 source; Story 1.13 is the pre-commit-gate enforcement layer.

Story 1.16 test-runner will unlock optional per-AC unit tests: snapshot AC 1 provenance header + output paths; byte-identical round-trip harness for AC 2; enumerate CSS var / Tailwind key / Python attribute against token leaf enumeration for AC 3/4/5; purity sandbox (deny network/time/RNG/env via runtime proxy) for AC 6. None block Story 1.12 `sm-verified → done` transition.
Run /bmad-testarch-test-review to assess test quality (no tests exist — no-op; recorded for parity with downstream pipelines).
